TaxBracket.title: Tax Bracket
TaxBracket.description: Configuration for a single tax bracket tier

limit.description: The upper bound of the income for this bracket. Null for the top bracket.

rate.description: The tax rate for this bracket (e.g. 0.15 for 15%).

order.description: The sorting order of the bracket.

taxBrackets.description: True NoSQL collection of tax brackets for dynamic configuration.
